findings.evidence: Lines 336-338 identify `columnSwapNeighbors` as the off-diagonal image; `GridState` wraps a permutation and `swapColumns_apply` gives composition with `Equiv.swap`, so equality of targets implies equality of the underlying transpositions up to order, whose off-diagonal Sym2 image has cardinality `n.choose 2` by `Sym2.card_image_offDiag`.
findings.fix: Replace or supplement it with `x.columnSwapNeighbors.card = n.choose 2`, proving `pairSwap` injective on the off-diagonal Sym2 image, then derive the `≤` lemma if needed.
findings.issue: `card_columnSwapNeighbors_le` states only `x.columnSwapNeighbors.card ≤ n.choose 2`, but the neighbor set has exactly one element for each unordered pair of distinct columns.

summary: The support bounds are at the right level, but the new API weakens the exact cardinality of the column-swap neighbor set to a one-sided bound.
